case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. MICHELLE ROSIE BREZEALE

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY IS PRESENT JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTION MANAGER. MICHELLE ROSIE BREZEALE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,371.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BREZEALE, MICHELLE ROSIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREZEALE, MICHELLE ROSIE $1,371.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,422.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
